overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a rocky mountain trail to a campsite under a large overhang, then sitting in a tent overlooking a valley, with the camera finally panning across the campfire to reveal a scenic view of a river and distant settlement in a rainy, overcast mountain environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail under stone overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky path beneath a large stone overhang, with a creek visible to the left

entered.detail: large stone overhang providing shelter overhead
vertical rock face lining the right side of the path
narrow stream running through the valley to the left
tall pine trees on the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky trail sheltered beneath a massive stone overhang. A creek runs parallel to the path on the left, while a steep cliff wall rises on the right. The atmosphere is quiet and overcast, with pine trees visible on the distant slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite under rock shelter with canvas tent

events.description: character enters the campsite and sits inside a canvas tent
character sits down and looks out at the valley view

agents.ego_description: sitting inside a canvas tent near the entrance, looking out at a valley with a small town in the distance

entered.detail: tan canvas tent with open flaps framing the view
small campfire burning with orange flames
small town or camp visible in the valley below
wide mountain valley with forested slopes

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to the character sitting inside a canvas tent at the campsite, looking out through the open flaps. A campfire burns in the center ground, and a distant settlement is visible in the valley below. The rock overhang now forms a ceiling above the sheltered campsite.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with campfire and panoramic valley view

events.description: camera shifts focus from the character to the campfire and begins panning right
camera pans to reveal the full river valley and distant landscape

agents.ego_description: sitting by the tent as the camera pans away to showcase the surrounding landscape

notable_agents.action: sitting by the tent, visible at the start of the segment before exiting the frame

entered.detail: winding river flowing through the mountain valley
scattered large rocks along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right from the character to focus on the campfire, then continues sweeping across the rocky overlook to reveal a panoramic view of the river valley below. The canvas tent and character exit the frame as the view opens up to show the winding river, scattered boulders, and forested mountain slopes under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered mountain trail into a cozy campsite that eventually opens up to a panoramic valley view. It begins by following a character along a narrow rocky path tucked beneath a massive stone overhang, with a creek running parallel to the trail and steep cliffs rising on the right. As the camera moves deeper into the shelter, the scene shifts to the interior of a canvas tent where the character sits looking out toward a burning campfire and a distant settlement in the valley. The camera then pans right, moving away from the character and the tent to focus on the glowing embers of the fire before sweeping across the rocky overlook. Finally, the view expands fully to reveal a wide vista of a winding river, scattered boulders, and forested mountain slopes under a heavy, overcast sky.
